productDisplayName: FILA Men Dls Maxim Black Sports Shoes
description: Win those winning baskets in style with these fila DLS Game Basketball shoes. With a simple-yet-stylish design, enriched with DLS foam cushioning and a grippy outsole, it’s designed to bring out the winner in you.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute durability, breathable comfort and styleHigh ankle collar for better support to the lower legLace-up system for a snug, customized FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug and fresh all-day comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionDynamic Landing System (DLS) for better impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole textured along the centre length and has herringbone grooves on the rest of the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various courtsCurved midfoot for enhanced inner arch ergonomic supportshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
